properties.name: cellItemTemplate
properties.description: Templete to use when rendering cells

properties.name: columnDefinitions
properties.description: Configure the grid header columns

properties.name: focusColumnIndex
properties.description: Index of column to be focused on when the Data Grid receives focus

properties.name: focusRowIndex
properties.description: Index of row to be focused on when the Data Grid receives focus

properties.name: generateHeader
properties.description: Type of header to be generated

properties.name: headerCellItemTemplate
properties.description: Templete to use when rendering grid header cells

properties.name: grid-template-columns
properties.description: Sets the width of the columns

properties.name: no-tabbing
properties.description: Remove the grid from the tab order

properties.name: rowsData
properties.description: Content of the grid in data format

properties.name: rowElementTag
properties.description: Element tag for header rows

properties.name: rowItemTemplate
properties.description: Templete to use when rendering rows

properties.name: selection-mode
properties.description: Set the selection mode

properties.name: fixed-columns
properties.description: Sets the number of columns fixed to the left when horizontal scrolling

properties.name: `columnDataKey`
properties.description: The property from which the data of the column is taken from

properties.name: `title`
properties.description: The title of the column

properties.name: `headerCellTemplate`
properties.description: A custom template for a header cell

properties.name: `headerCellInternalFocusQueue`
properties.description: Indicates whether the header cell has in internal focus queue. This should be set to `true` for header cells that host controls that need to use arrow keys or have multiple focusable internal elements. When the user hits the Enter or F2 key the element specified by the `headerCellFocusTargetCallback` function will be focused (see keyboard interactions described [here](https://w3c.github.io/aria-practices/#grid)).

properties.name: `headerCellFocusTargetCallback`
properties.description: Callback function that takes the cell node as a parameter and returns the HTMLElement to focus in a custom cell. This enables authors to direct focus in a custom cell with interactive elements. When `headerCellInternalFocusQueue` is `false` this function is called when the cell is first focused to immediately move focus to a cell element, for example a cell that contains a button could move focus directly to the button when focused. When `headerCellInternalFocusQueue` is `true` this function is called when the user hits Enter or F2.

properties.name: `cellTemplate`
properties.description: A custom template for a cell

properties.name: `cellInternalFocusQueue`
properties.description: Indicates whether the cell has in internal focus queue. This should be set to `true` for cells that host controls that need to use arrow keys or have multiple focusable internal elements. When the user hits the Enter or F2 key the element specified by the `cellFocusTargetCallback` function will be focused (see keyboard interactions described [here](https://w3c.github.io/aria-practices/#grid)).

properties.name: `cellFocusTargetCallback`
properties.description: Callback function that takes the cell node as a parameter and returns the `HTMLElement` to focus in a custom cell. This enables authors to direct focus in a custom cell with interactive elements. When `cellInternalFocusQueue` is `false` this function is called when the cell is first focused to immediately move focus to a cell element, for example a cell that contains a button could move focus directly to the button when focused. When `cellInternalFocusQueue` is `true` this function is called when the user hits Enter or F2.

properties.name: `isRowHeader`
properties.description: Whether this column is the row header

properties.name: `sortable`
properties.description: Whether this column is sortable

properties.name: `sortDirection`
properties.description: Define the column's sort direction

properties.name: `aria-selected`
properties.description: Selected state of row

properties.name: `row-type`
properties.description: Selected state of row

properties.name: `cell-type`
properties.description: The type of cell

properties.name: `grid-column`
properties.description: The column index of the cell. This will be applied to the CSS grid-column index value applied to the cell

properties.name: `selected`
properties.description: Selected state of cell

properties.name: `sort-direction`
properties.description: Sort state of the header cell

events.name: `row-focused`
events.description: Fires a custom 'row-focused' event when focus is on an element (usually a cell or its contents) in the row

events.name: `cell-focused`
events.description: Fires a custom 'cell-focused' event when focus is on the cell or its contents

events.name: `sort`
events.description: Event that fires when a sortable column header is clicked

events.name: `cell-click`
events.description: Event that fires when a cell is clicked

slots.name: default
slots.description: Use the default slot to set the content of the cell

slots.name: action-items
slots.description: Add action items to the cell using this slot
